title: The Barnabas Blog - The Diocese of Sheffield
headings: h2: Find what you're looking for
text_excerpt: The Barnabas Blog - The Diocese of Sheffield Skip to content Safeguarding Survivor Support Lifelong Learning Directory Contact Church Support Ordained Ministry All the resources and encouragement on offer for clergy and their households Lay Ministries An overview of the many forms of lay ministry in our Diocese For Churches Helping and supporting parishes in all aspects of church life Safeguarding We have a professionally qualified safeguarding team who are the first point of contact for any concerns or queries in this area Centenary Project Equipping local church to disciple a new generation of young people, children and families. Ordained Ministry All the resources and encouragement on offer for clergy and their households Clergy Housing Our housing team, led by Michael, work hard to make sure that you can have peace of mind about your […] Initial Ministerial Education (IME2) IME2 aims to form and equip ministers who enable God’s people in God’s mission. Oversight Ministry A short introduction to the role of Oversight Ministry in the Diocese Chaplaincy Information about all of our different forms of chaplaincy across the Diocese. Permission to Officiate Authorisation granted by the Bishop for retired or non-stipendiary clergy to minister within the diocese. Ministerial Development Review Information and important forms for the full MDR process Partners Together A network of spouses, partners and families of the clergy supporting one another. Wellbeing in Ministry Information about dignity and flourishing in ministry. OMD – Clergy Resources and programmes to help clergy keep growing in their skills and spiritual life Sabbaticals Information and support about organising a Sabbatical Lay Ministries An overview of the many forms of lay ministry in our Diocese Reader Ministry How to train as a reader in the diocese of Sheffield, resources and events available to readers in the diocese Focal Ministry Supporting and resourcing Focal Ministers Children & Youth Ministry See how your parish can grow younger by loving and serving your community Spiritual Accompaniment Information about the ministry of spiritual accompaniment and two courses we offer Lay Parish Evangelists Information about Lay Parish Evangelist Ministry and how to explore a calling to this. Commissioned Lay Ministries Recognising the many forms of ministries serving Jesus in our churches and communities Ongoing Ministerial Development for Lay Ministers Useful resources and learning opportunities for all licensed, authorised and commissioned lay ministers. The Barnabas Blog A regular blog supporting ministry leaders For Churches Helping and supporting parishes in all aspects of church life Worship & Prayer Resources for church members & church leaders for corporate and individual prayer and worship Church Operations & Finance A wide variety of inspirational resources and guidance covering all things financial including generosity, grants and finance Church Buildings Guidance and support to help church leaders and PCCs make the most of their buildings Welcome & Belonging Support in giving a really warm welcome to people visiting our churches so that they want to return Church Growth, Evangelism & New Congregations Church growth, evangelism & new congregations is the Diocese of Sheffield fulfilling its vision Deliberately Digital Deliberately Digital is the Diocese of Sheffield’s approach to digital mission Environment & Climate Change The Earth is our common home and God calls us all to care for creation Social Transformation God has called and equipped us to seek restoration and transformation for the world around us Human Resources Helping church leaders and PCCs with human resources and employment issues. Communications Helping church leaders and administrators communicate stories and key messages Mission Action Planning A process of bite-size steps to help the church survive, thrive and multiply Safeguarding We have a professionally qualified safeguarding team
